## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Upload file '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment
- **Stirling-PDF Version**: [e.g. 0.30.1]
- **Deployment Method**: [e.g. Docker, Docker Compose, Local Build]
- **OS**: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11, macOS 14]
- **Browser**: [e.g. Chrome 120, Firefox 121]
- **Java Version** (if local build): [e.g. 17]

## Docker Compose / Configuration
If using Docker, please share your `docker-compose.yml` or run command (remove sensitive data):

```yaml
# paste here
```

## Logs
Please include relevant logs from the application:

```
# paste logs here
```

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have included all relevant information above
- [ ] I am using the latest version of Stirling-PDF
